prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别约41781→47179→52345→43810→55395名，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字增大=竞争趋缓），2025年因四川省首年新高考改革（文理分科改为历史/物理类），位次大幅后移至55395名，较2024年上升约11585名，波动显著；本省理科/物理类计划2021年3076人、2022年3190人、2023年3243人、2024年3222人、2025年3412人；2026年计划3394人，较2025年小幅缩减约0.53%，扩招趋势暂缓，对竞争有轻微加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年持续上升，2021年第162名→2026年第134名，排名提升反映学校综合实力稳步增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；2022年声誉中性/混合（投档线下降舆情+学校正面回应），2023年偏正面（食堂服务好、投诉处理及时）；抖音热度总排名第86位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量中等，未见明显负面舆情冲击；畜牧学A、作物学A-，为该校核心优势学科，对应动物科学、动物医学、农学等招生专业，在农林类院校中具有较强竞争力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度持续高热，与该校物理类招生专业高度重合；四川省2026年高考报名总人数约53.5万人，较2025年约46.3万人增长约15.6%，考生规模显著扩大，整体竞争加剧；四川农业大学位于四川省成都市，为本省唯一农林类211高校，在本省招生占比极高（2025年物理类3412人占全国总计划绝大部分），本省考生报考意愿强烈，地域偏好明显。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年新高考改革首年位次大幅后移的基准、2026年招生计划微幅缩减、本省考生总数显著增长约15.6%以及学校软科排名持续上升等因素，预计2026年物理类竞争较2025年有所加剧，位次将小幅前移。预测最低位次约55000名，区间54500–55500名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 41781 → 47179 → 52345 → 43810 → 55395, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (larger ranking numbers indicate less competition). In 2025, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform in Sichuan Province (changing from arts/science division to History/Physics categories), the ranking significantly dropped to 55395, an increase of about 11585 places compared to 2024, with notable fluctuations. The provincial Science/Physics Category enrollment plans were 3076 in 2021, 3190 in 2022, 3243 in 2023, 3222 in 2024, and 3412 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 3394, a slight reduction of about 0.53% compared to 2025, temporarily slowing the expansion trend, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking on the Soft Science main list has been rising in recent years, from 162nd in 2021 to 134th in 2026, reflecting a steady enhancement of the university's comprehensive strength and increasing attractiveness to candidates. In 2022, the reputation was neutral/mixed (public opinion on declining admission scores plus the university's positive response), and in 2023, it was somewhat positive (good cafeteria service, timely complaint handling). On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 86th, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure and no significant negative public opinion impact. Animal Science is rated A, and Crop Science is A-, which are the university's core advantageous disciplines, corresponding to enrollment majors such as Animal Science, Veterinary Medicine, and Agriculture, showing strong competitiveness among agricultural and forestry institutions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Electronic Information/Communication continue to be highly popular in society, and they overlap significantly with the university's Physics Category enrollment majors. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination registrants in Sichuan Province is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to approximately 463,000 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying overall competition. Sichuan Agricultural University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, and is the only agricultural and forestry 211 university in the province. It has a very high proportion of enrollment within the province (in 2025, 3412 Physics Category students account for the vast majority of the national total plan), leading to strong willingness among provincial candidates to apply, with clear regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of a significant ranking drop in the first year of the new college entrance examination reform in 2025, a slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, a notable increase of about 15.6% in the total number of provincial candidates, and the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking, it is expected that competition in the Physics Category in 2026 will intensify compared to 2025, with rankings moving slightly forward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 55000, with a range of 54500–55500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 54500–55500, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<54500), you can focus on aiming for popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (>55500), you should prioritize Tier 3 safety majors while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors. The university has distinct agricultural and forestry characteristics, and advantageous discipline majors such as Veterinary Medicine and Agriculture offer high cost-performance, making them worth serious consideration.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 15900 → 6572 → 6020 → 5934 → 6142 respectively. The 2021 ranking was abnormally high (15900), but from 2022 onward it moved significantly forward to the 6000 range and stabilized, with a fluctuation range of 5934–6572 in the past 4 years. The 2025 baseline is about 6142. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plans were 686 in 2021, 660 in 2022, 629 in 2023, 640 in 2024, and 587 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 595, a slight expansion of about 1.36% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university. The Soft Science main ranking has been rising in recent years, from 162nd in 2021 to 134th in 2026, reflecting steady improvement in comprehensive strength. In 2022, reputation was neutral/mixed; in 2023, it was slightly positive (canteen and dormitory conditions received good reviews). On Douyin, the overall popularity ranking is 86th, with a rating of 'average', and no obvious negative public opinion. Animal Husbandry is rated A, Crop Science A-, although mainly focused on agriculture and forestry, the overall 211 level still strongly attracts liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and Accounting are socially popular to recommended, highly matching the history category enrollment majors of this university (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Accounting, Financial Management, etc.). In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam registrants in Sichuan Province is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% from about 463,000 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying overall competition. Sichuan Agricultural University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, and is the only 211 agricultural and forestry university in the province. It has a very high proportion of liberal arts/history category enrollment within the province, with strong willingness of local candidates to apply and obvious regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation trend of rankings in the 6000 range over the past 4 years, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan by about 1.36%, the significant increase in the total number of provincial candidates by about 15.6%, and the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking, it is expected that competition in the history category in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with rankings moving slightly forward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 6150, with a range of 5650–6650.
